# Restore & Relax by Iulia

> Mobile massage therapy delivered to your home across Woking and Surrey.

Iulia is a fully qualified massage therapist based in Woking, Surrey. She offers a mobile service — bringing all equipment to your home. Travel fees are included in the price.

## Services & Prices

- **Sports Massage** — £70 / 60 min · £100 / 90 min. Deep tissue and stretching techniques to aid recovery, prevent injury and enhance athletic performance.
- **Deep Tissue Massage** — £70 / 60 min · £100 / 90 min. Firm pressure reaching deeper muscle layers to release chronic tension and knots.
- **Swedish Massage** — £70 / 60 min · £100 / 90 min. Classic full-body relaxation using long, flowing strokes to calm the nervous system.
- **Pregnancy Massage** — £70 / 60 min. Gentle, adapted techniques safe throughout all trimesters. Relieves back pain, reduces swelling, improves sleep.
- **Manual Lymphatic Drainage (MLD)** — £70 / 60 min. Light, rhythmic techniques to stimulate lymph flow, reduce swelling and support the immune system. Commonly recommended post-surgery.
- **Oncology Massage** — £60 / 60 min. Specially adapted gentle massage for people living with, recovering from, or beyond cancer. Safe around surgical sites and medical devices.

## Coverage Area

Based in Woking, Surrey. Covers a 10-mile radius including:
Woking, Guildford, Camberley, Weybridge, Cobham, Leatherhead, Byfleet, West Byfleet, Farnborough, Fleet, Send, Ripley, Pyrford and surrounding villages.

## Booking

Book via WhatsApp. Iulia comes to your home with all equipment. No clinic visit required.

## About

Iulia is a fully qualified massage therapist with a passion for restoring balance to body and mind. She provides personalised, professional treatments tailored to each client's individual needs — whether recovering from sport, managing chronic tension, or seeking deep relaxation.

## Key Facts

- Mobile service: therapist comes to you
- All travel fees included in the price
- Available 7 days a week, 8am–8pm
- Payment: cash or bank transfer
- Location: Woking, Surrey, United Kingdom
- Website: https://quaydale.github.io/restore-relax/
